prompts.label: Starting feels foggy
prompts.support: Shrink the return into one visible motion.

prompts.label: Too many open loops
prompts.support: Choose the next thing that can be clarified, not the whole pile.

prompts.label: My energy is low
prompts.support: Let the first two minutes stay gentle. Presence matters more than pace.

prompts.label: I am bracing for quality
prompts.support: Use the room to continue, not to prove anything.
